meaning: n.葡萄牙(欧洲西南部国家)
examples: It's Spain that they're going to, not Portugal.
Portugal has lodged a complaint with the International Court of Justice.
In Spain and Portugal there has been a decrease in the number of young people out of work.
But the 570, 000 or so immigrants from Portugal, white and Roman Catholic, are fully assimilated.
Last year, competitors represented countries ranging from Japan and Russia to Portugal, the United States and the Philippines.
